Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify cases logical units of work Map low level actions to higher level activities Create a structured event log with required attributes

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Looking at the log I can see several work sessions happening Session 1 Document1 docx editing Starts with FOCUS on Document1 docx TYPING content SAVE SWITCH to email Later returns and continues editing SAVE and CLOSE Session 2 Email handling Started from Document1 docx session Opening email replying sending SWITCH to PDF review Session 3 PDF review Opening Report Draft pdf SCROLL and HIGHLIGHT Session 4 Budget 2024 xlsx editing FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH back to Word Session 5 Quarterly Report docx editing Separate session starting at 09 07 15 TYPING SAVE CLOSE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The challenge is determining how to group these into cases I could interpret this as Option 1 Each document one case multiple documents edited in sequence Option 2 Each work session one case logical work period Option 3 Each work context one case eg Prepare Quarterly Report as one case

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I think the most analyst friendly approach would be to create cases based on logical work contexts

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: However for process mining it might be better to create separate cases for each distinct document or work item

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Let me think about this differently

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user seems to be working on multiple related tasks Working on Document1 docx with interim email checking Reviewing Report Draft pdf Updating Budget 2024 xlsx Working on Quarterly Report docx

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I could create cases based on Each document Document1 docx Budget 2024 xlsx Quarterly Report docx Each major work context eg Prepare Q4 Report which encompasses multiple documents

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill go with a hybrid approach grouping events by document while recognizing the interconnected nature of the work

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This means creating separate cases for each document but acknowledging the workflow connections between them The key is to transform raw actions into meaningful process steps that reveal the users work pattern

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The case naming will reflect the document or task with activity names capturing the essence of the users interaction

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: I see four primary work contexts emerging from the log Document1 docx editing email communication PDF review and Budget spreadsheet updates Each represents a distinct process that can be mapped to a case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The workflow suggests interconnected tasks with natural progression between document preparation communication review and financial tracking

Name: Validation - PE
Text: By structuring cases around these specific work contexts I can capture the full spectrum of the users activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: My approach will focus on creating meaningful case identifiers that reflect the core work being performed ensuring each case represents a coherent segment of the overall project workflow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill map each document and task to a distinct case maintaining the natural progression of work while preserving the interconnected nature of the activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: This allows for clear process tracing and understanding of how different components relate to the broader quarterly reporting effort

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The key is to balance granular task representation with a holistic view of the work creating a structured approach that supports detailed analysis without losing the overall project context

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The workflow involves multiple document interactions starting with initial draft creation and progressing through email communication PDF review and budget updates Each document represents a distinct work context with specific tasks like typing saving and switching between applications

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The process reveals a systematic approach to document preparation and review with clear transitions between different work modes and tools

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The activity names reflect precise actions like editing saving and reviewing capturing the nuanced workflow of document management and financial tracking This structured approach allows for clear tracking of progress and specific interactions within each work context
